final:
module RefModule(
  input A,
  input B,
  input CLK,
  input RST,
  output reg Y
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!RST) begin
      Y <= 0;
    end else begin
      Y <= A & B;
    end
  end

endmodule
